g.text: 3D Parallelism Process Grid | DP × TP × PP Architecture

div.p: The global rank is determined using a nested stride approach based on the parallelism dimensions:

g.text: Each GPU belongs to exactly 3 process groups (one per dimension)

p.strong: Intersection Logic (Total Size = TP × PP × DP)

div.p: Formation: Same pp_rank, same dp_rank. Scope: Usually within a single node over NVLink.
Formation: Same tp_rank, same dp_rank. Scope: Inter-stage communication.
Formation: Same tp_rank, same pp_rank. Scope: Cross-node gradient synchronization.
